# Download the CompactifAI APP now
Built on Multiverse Computing’s CompactifAI technology, this mobile APP lets you interact with advanced AI models optimized to run locally on your device — even without an internet connection.
[![Download on the App Store](https://multiversecomputing.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.sanity.io%2Fimages%2Fls8k7ser%2Fdevelopment%2Ff1c36a855df32542e20efbfe714ecba18ad45606-24x24.png&w=48&q=75)Download on the App Store](https://apps.apple.com/app/id6749544702)[![Get it on Google Play](https://multiversecomputing.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.sanity.io%2Fimages%2Fls8k7ser%2Fdevelopment%2Fd2bc0950ce4b6d7610847a4674539bbb031299d3-24x24.png&w=48&q=75)Get it on Google Play](https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.multiversecomputing.compactifaizoo)
